import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut product = 1
  mut token = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i <= n
    mut b = 32
    if i < n
      b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        32
      end
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        let v = match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        product = product * v
        token = ""
      end
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  print("product=#{product}")
end
